action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline EER=0.1181 (acc@EER=0.8853) achieved with wav2vec2-base after 5 epochs; loss drops rapidly to ~0.004 indicating quick fit on seen attacks but room for better OOD generalization on codecs/unseen attacks (test EER still >10%). Metrics show dev EER logged per epoch; model loading has expected 'unexpected keys' for quantizer (normal for Wav2Vec2Model). No OOM this run thanks to max_length+bf16. Analysis: Current SpoofDetector (not yet inspected) is likely basic mean-pool+linear; literature shows WavLM + stats pooling (mean+std) + small MLP head significantly lowers EER on ASVspoof LA. Larger backbone (wavlm-large 317M <1B limit) needs batch reduction. Time left (7.6h) and ~18min/iter allows ~10 epochs safely. Decision: First inspect current model.py + metrics (per critical rule before any edit), then in next iter update to AutoModel+stats-pool+MLP with default='microsoft/wavlm-large', smaller batches, more epochs, and submit_eval for improved score.
action.command:
cat model.py && echo '

=== METRICS ===
' && cat logs/iter_8/metrics.jsonl && echo '

=== MODEL PARAMS SUMMARY ===' && python -c '
import torch
from model import SpoofDetector
model = SpoofDetector()
print(model)
if hasattr(model, "encoder"): print("Encoder type:", type(model.encoder).__name__)
print("Pretrained name:", getattr(model, "pretrained_model", getattr(model, "pretrain_name", "unknown")))
total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
print("Trainable params:", total_params)
'

command_output.stdout:
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import Wav2Vec2Model

class SpoofDetector(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, pretrained_model="facebook/wav2vec2-base"):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = Wav2Vec2Model.from_pretrained(pretrained_model)
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.encoder.config.hidden_size, 1)
        self.pretrained_model = pretrained_model

    def forward(self, input_values, attention_mask=None):
        outputs = self.encoder(input_values, attention_mask=attention_mask)
        hidden_states = outputs.last_hidden_state
        pooled = hidden_states.mean(dim=1)
        logits = self.classifier(pooled).squeeze(-1)
        return logits

    def get_pretrain_name(self):
        return self.pretrained_model
